text: Natural language processing (NLP) is a fascinating field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. By analyzing text, NLP allows machines to grasp meaning, detect patterns, and even translate between languages automatically. For example, when you use a translation app, NLP enables it to convert English to Spanish or other languages. Another important use is sentiment analysis, where computers evaluate opinions in reviews or social media posts to decide if they are positive or negative. You also encounter NLP with chatbots, which use language understanding to answer questions or assist customers. As technology advances, NLP continues to improve how we interact with machines.
